description: LEFT JOIN a table with a view — right side columns become nullable

columns.name: order_count
columns.note: RIGHT side of LEFT JOIN: view column becomes nullable because unmatched left rows produce NULL

name: join_table_with_view
query_sql:
-- @name GetUsersWithOrderSummary
-- @returns :many
SELECT u.name, s.order_count FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_order_summary s ON u.id = s.user_id
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active');
CREATE TABLE orders (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), total INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE VIEW user_order_summary AS SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.name, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.name;
